info.title: TaskNotes API
info.description: RESTful API for managing tasks, time tracking, and automation in TaskNotes

bearerAuth.description: Optional bearer token for API authentication

error.description: Error message (present when success is false)

withTimeTracking.description: Number of tasks with time tracking entries

transformFile.description: Optional transform file path for payload customization

corsHeaders.description: Whether to include custom headers (disable for strict CORS services)

isRunning.description: Whether a pomodoro session is currently running

completed.description: Whether the session was completed (not interrupted)

startTime.description: ISO timestamp when time tracking started

endTime.description: ISO timestamp when time tracking ended (null if still running)

description.description: Optional description of work being tracked

duration.description: Duration in minutes (calculated or manually set)

isActive.description: Whether this time entry is currently active

elapsedMinutes.description: Total elapsed minutes for this session

from.description: Start date of the summary period

to.description: End date of the summary period

totalHours.description: Total tracked time in hours (rounded to 2 decimals)

tasksWithTime.description: Number of tasks with time tracking data

activeTasks.description: Number of tasks with active time tracking

completedTasks.description: Number of completed tasks with time tracking

minutes.description: Total minutes tracked for this task
Total minutes tracked for this project
Total minutes tracked for this tag

totalMinutes.description: Total time tracked for this task in minutes

totalHours.description: Total time tracked for this task in hours

totalSessions.description: Total number of time tracking sessions

timeEntries.description: All time entries for this task

error.description: Error message describing what went wrong
